zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Willoughby於大約1268年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Sir William de Willoughby29歲，母親Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby28歲。他與Margaret Mumby在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年之後在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Willoughby was born about 1268, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Willoughby, was 29 and his mother, Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, was 28. He married Margaret Mumby in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died after 1300, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margaret Mumby à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1300, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat in England, United Kingdom Margaret Mumby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1300 in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Willoughbyが約1268年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de Willoughbyは29歳，母Alice de Beke heiress of Eresbyは28歳であった。イギリスイギリスでMargaret Mumbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Willoughby(이)가 대략 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Willoughby(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby(은)는 28세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Mumby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Willoughby родился около 1268 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Willoughby было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mumby в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер после 1300 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
